articles.title: Divergent regional responses of soil moisture-air temperature coupling under future climate scenarios
articles.description: Using climate-model projections, this study finds that regions where soil moisture controls summer heat will shift poleward under strong warming, raising the risk of compound drought– heatwave events at high latitudes and in the humid tropics.

articles.title: Encoding orbital angular momentum of light in space with optical catastrophes
articles.description: By shaping optical caustics with metasurfaces, the authors sculpt the orbital angular momentum (OAM) of light in 3D space. This strategy supports hidden OAM states, and enables multidimensional optical encryption.
